zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonathan Sisson於1687年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯時，他的父親James Sisson I31歲，母親Lydia Hathaway29歲。他於1723年2月7日與Mary Wood在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1747年住在美國羅得島紐波特波斯姆斯。他去世於大約1755年5月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonathan Sisson于1687年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯时，他的父亲James Sisson I31岁，母亲Lydia Hathaway29岁。他于1723年2月7日与Mary Wood在美国罗德岛州紐波特蕾托 康普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1747年住在美国罗德岛州紐波特波斯姆斯。他去世于大约1755年5月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sisson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Sis(se), Cisse, a pet form of Cecily (see Sisley ) + -son.
variant of Syson, a habitational name from Syston (Leicestershire), from a short form of an Old English personal name such as Sigehǣth or Sigefrith + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Sissons
meanings: variant of Sisson , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Sisley
meanings: English (Kent): from the popular Middle English female personal name Sisely (Old French Cecile, Cicile, from Latin Caecilia, feminine form of the Roman surname Caecilius, a derivative of caecus ‘blind’). This was the name of a early Christian virgin martyr of the 2nd or 3rd century, who came to be regarded as the patron saint of music. The surname is generally spelt with C- in the Middle Ages, following the trend of the personal name, and with S- in modern times. Compare Cecil and see also Sise , Sisson .

nameMeanings.name: Jonathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathan
meanings: Respelling of   Jonathan  , as if a combination of   John   and   Nathan .

variants.name: Jonathon
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Jonathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathon
meanings: Mainly U.S.: respelled form of   Jonathan  , influenced by   John .

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonathan Sisson was born in 1687, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, James Sisson I, was 31 and his mother, Lydia Hathaway, was 29. He married Mary Wood on 7 February 1723, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, United States in 1747. He died about May 1755, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonathan Sisson est né en 1687, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, James Sisson I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lydia Hathaway, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary Wood le 7 février 1723, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis en 1747. Il est décédé environ mai 1755, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonathan Sisson 1687 in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Sisson I 31 und seine Mutter Lydia Hathaway 29. Er hat am 7. Februar 1723 in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1747 hat er in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb um Mai 1755 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Sisson è nato il nel 1687 nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, James Sisson I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lydia Hathaway, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mary Wood il 7 febbraio 1723, nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1747. Morì circa maggio 1755, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonathan Sissonが1687年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで生まれた時，父James Sisson Iは31歳，母Lydia Hathawayは29歳であった。1723年2月7日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトリットル コンプトンでMary Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1747年にはアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトポルトスモウスに住んでいた。彼は約1755年5月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで68歳で死去した。

ko.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스
ko.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스

ko.Little Compton, Rhode Island, British Co: 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Jonathan Sisson(이)가 1687년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Sisson I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lydia Hathaway(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1723년 2월 7일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 Mary Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1747년도에 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 포츠모우스에서 살았다. 그는 대략 1755년 5월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Sisson nasceu em 1687, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, James Sisson I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lydia Hathaway, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Wood em 7 de fevereiro de 1723, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América em 1747. Ele faleceu aproximadamente maio de 1755, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonathan Sisson родился в 1687 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени James Sisson I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lydia Hathaway, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Wood 7 февраля 1723 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности порцмоут, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в 1747 году. Он умер около май 1755 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonathan Sisson nació en 1687, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, James Sisson I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lydia Hathaway, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mary Wood el 7 de febrero de 1723, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos en 1747. Murió aproximadamente mayo de 1755, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años.
